text: Meet Argo — the tool that turns Playwright scripts into polished product demo videos, complete with A.I. voiceover.
The workflow is three steps. Write, record, export. Watch how Argo zooms into each step to guide your eye — that's the new camera language.
Overlays appear on screen while camera effects like dim-around highlight what matters. Overlays and camera work together, independently.
A focus ring pulses around the code block. Spotlight, focus ring, dim-around, and zoom-to are all one-liners in your demo script.
Overlays auto-detect your page theme. Argo also generates subtitles, chapter markers, and a scene timing report alongside every video.
Oh, and this demo? It was recorded by Argo, using Argo.
